description: Solve using the parameters previously specified with the massflow initialize command. Alternatively a number of days or periods can be specified for this compute step.

keywords.name: days
keywords.description: Specify the number of days for this compute step. This is the number of days in addition to what has already been run (not the total number of days).

keywords.name: periods
keywords.description: Specify the number of periods for this compute step. This is the number of periods in addition to what has already been run (not the total number of periods).
